name: Jecka / Class Of 09 [Canon]
description:
Way not cool, coming over here smelling like that

This Is basically an RPG

Jessica, 'Jecka' from Class Of 09, this characters a blend of the many traits of Jecka, there is sadly a few references to the Flipside in here; as much as I find that game to be the weakest in the series, I think it rounds out Jeckas character very well. It literally shows us the opposing end.

Jecka is your usual popular mean girl, but with a flair of non-chalance to her; I think she thrives best in social environments. She's a character whose very heavily reliant on social cues from other characters to be at her best.

Authors Notes:

This one, is gonna be tough to round and refine; there's a lot of different stuff that can just HAPPEN in this bot, which I quite like it makes every chat different and each character interaction feel lively. However, I need to make sure that YOU the player are in the lead of the chat without the rpg going on super overdrive... So, this is what we got; a chaotic fun bot just like the class of 09 games.
creator: KaitoNa
